类 ScalarValueType

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.grpc.proto.ScalarValueType
所有已实现的接口:
Serializable
public class ScalarValueType extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a scalar value type definition from JSON.
